name: Picsart AI Agent Marketplace
description: Marketplace enabling creators to deploy and manage specialized AI assistants for visual content tasks including resizing, remixing, editing product images, and optimizing online stores.
capabilities: Deploy specialized AI assistants for creators
notes: Launched March 2026. First-generation marketplace for visual content agents. Agent-native but marketplace is in early stage with limited integration examples. Staging for further review before full indexing.
